description: Circleback is an AI meeting productivity platform that records or transcribes meetings, generates notes and action items, and lets users search meeting, calendar, and email context. It also supports automations and exposes that context to AI tools and the terminal.
summary: Circleback exposes an OAuth-protected remote MCP server at `https://app.circleback.ai/api/mcp` (streamable HTTP) and an official npm CLI (`@circleback/cli`); both use Circleback account OAuth, and Circleback also documents outbound webhooks but no public REST or GraphQL API surface.
